info: On weapon attack, there is a chance that one of two things will happen: A percentage (LHT: 3%, MED: 4.5%, HVY: 6%) of your maximum health will be added to your attack's scaled damage. This is applied before damage modifiers. You lose 7% of your maximum health instead. This can autogrip you. Curse of Yun'Shul has a 12 second cooldown per victim.
name: Curse of Yun'Shul
in_game_desc: Has a chance to inflict a curse that deals percentage damage, but who it falls upon is often down to luck.
